subject: Re: NVIDIA RTX A5000 and Warp 1.1-beta compatibility
body:
Hey Shintaro,

Can confirm it's working! :-)

Cheers,

Alister

On Wed, 20 Mar 2024 at 07:03, Shintaro Aibara <shintaro.aibara@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Dear Warp Community,
>
> Can anybody confirm or deny whether Warp 1.1-beta works with Ada Lovelace
> GPUs? In particular A5000s would be of interest, but 40-series GPUs would
> be fine too.
>
> I remember the 1.1-beta introduced compatbility for the "newer" cards but
> I believe that was when the 30-series were kicking around?
>
> Thanks in advance!
> Shintaro
